cleavage agent: rehydrated in trypsin (0.005 µg/µL) overnight at 37 °C.
instrument: Mass spectrometry was performed using a Q Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer
ionization type: operating in positive ion electrospray ionization mode.
labeling: we conducted TMT-based quantitative proteomic analysis of purified cyanoglobules
reduction reagent: reduced with DTT (10 mM in 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate)
reduction concentration: reduced with DTT (10 mM in 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate)
